title: Called-in decision: land south of Gazelle Close, Winnersh (ref: 3339712 - 27 October 2025)
body: "Decision letter and Inspector’s Report for a called-in application for the erection of a foodstore with associated access, parking and servicing areas, landscaping, and other associated works to include solar panels to the roof, in accordance with application ref. 230099, dated 13 January 2023. "
